habitat: Pacific islands; cultivated in Fiji, Vanuatu, PNG, Samoa, etc.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Pacific ceremonial beverage for social relaxation and mild anxiolysis.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelles pazifisches Zeremoniengetränk zur sozialen Entspannung.
preparation: Water extraction of peeled root; modern extracts (regulatory status varies by country).
cautions: Liver toxicity reports with some products—many jurisdictions restrict. Not with alcohol or hepatotoxic drugs. Not for pregnancy.
historicalNotes: Central to Melanesian and Polynesian social ritual for centuries.
habitatDe: Pacific islands; angebaut in Fiji, Vanuatu, PNG, Samoa, etc.
preparationDe: Water extraction von peeled Wurzel; modern Extrakte (regulatory status varies by country).
cautionsDe: Liver toxicity reports mit some products—many jurisdictions restrict. Not mit Alkohol oder hepatotoxic drugs. Not für Schwangerschaft.
historicalNotesDe: Central zu Melanesian und Polynesian social ritual für centuries.
